    Projects

    This portfolio collects my work across recommendation systems, predictive modeling, forecasting, and analytics. Each project is framed around a concrete problem, the modeling approach, and the outcome or decision it supports.

    Recommendation Systems

    Spotify New Song Recommender

    Machine learning recommendation pipeline designed to surface new songs that match a user's listening habits and genre preferences.

    Combined Spotify API data, affinity features, and ranking-aware LightGBM evaluation to optimize recommendation quality.

    Python LightGBM Precision@10: 72%
    Pricing & Forecasting

    NBA Ticket Demand Forecasting

    Ticket demand and pricing strategy project centered on forecasting game-level demand and recommending pricing adjustments.

    Placeholder case study for combining demand forecasting with dynamic pricing logic in a sports analytics setting.

    Python Forecasting Pricing
    Data Science

    Airbnb NYC Pricing Analysis

    Data analysis and predictive modeling project focused on what drives Airbnb prices across NYC and how accurately listing prices can be estimated.

    Placeholder case study for feature-driven price analysis, exploratory data analysis, and predictive modeling in R.

    R EDA Prediction
